naming_rule: Alphabetically sorted ISO Alpha-3 codes joined by underscore.

categories.name: Historical relationship
sample_questions: Which historical events shape current trust or hostility?

categories.name: Strategic dependencies
sample_questions: Which country depends more on the other economically?
Which supply chains, water systems, energy routes, or ports matter most?

categories.name: Conflict and cooperation
sample_questions: What are the main conflict points?
What cooperation mechanisms can reduce risk?

categories.name: Red lines and escalation
sample_questions: What actions would each country see as unacceptable?
What are the most likely escalation paths?
